title: work-at Dashboard App Live Dev Surface
description: Readonly health profile for a dashboard app surface where the live dev URL is the primary gate. The target must provide liveDevUrl, and may override appPath, localDevUrl, and liveDevMustContain through work-at health params.

runLocation.source: worker Bun dashboard gateway :3300 with managed Vite :5173

checks.title: work-at target is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore worker connectivity or re-register the live dev target before continuing.

checks.title: target path exists
checks.repairHint: Restore or re-register the target path on the worker before continuing.

checks.title: Bun is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Bun on the worker before running the dashboard app dev server.

checks.title: dashboard app package.json exists
checks.repairHint: Restore package.json in the dashboard app surface before continuing.

checks.title: dashboard app vite config exists
checks.repairHint: Restore vite.config.ts in the dashboard app surface before continuing.

checks.title: dashboard app local dev frontend is reachable
checks.repairHint: If local worker dev access is expected for this surface, restore the local dev frontend. The live dev URL remains the primary gate.

checks.title: persistent quicktunnel runtime state is live and stable
checks.repairHint: Do not restart/churn cloudflared for code updates. Keep the existing quicktunnel publicUrl in runtime-state.json, restart only the dashboard gateway or Vite behind port 3300/5173, and run scripts/ddev-dashboard-dev-surface.sh status before/after repairs.

checks.title: live dev surface responds with the expected dev marker
checks.repairHint: The live dev URL is the primary gate for this surface. Repair the worker-served live URL until it responds successfully and contains the expected dev marker before treating any code change as real.
